description: Soul by hugo boss gives off a woody impression with a balsamic temperament. This is for a romantic occasion, with its dark, mystical and subtle aromas. There is a freshness in the aromatic water of citrus, lavender, spices, pepper and anise. The note of pepper is prominent as well. Quantity: 90 ml Caution FlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
